content:
# Session 26 (iter-026) ‚Äî Review

## Metadata
- Prover lanes: 1 (opus) on FBC `Cohomology/FlatBaseChange.lean`. SNAP = plan-phase REVERT (no prover lane).
- Sorry-bearing decls (firsthand cold build): **FBC 4** (glue+probe region @ L2017/2032 now one chain, + 3 dead/frontier @2411/2686/2726) ‚Äî **but build is RED**; **SNAP 6** (@2314/3143/3165/3180/3183/3243, green monolith).
- **Net frontier elimination: 0.** No new sorry-free decls (the probe is sorry-backed).
- **CRITICAL REGRESSION: FBC `FlatBaseChange.lean` no longer cold-builds** ‚Äî `exact ring_square_cocycle_probe ‚Ä¶` @L2233 ‚Üí whnf 200k-hb deterministic timeout @L2235. Verified firsthand twice.
- SNAP build GREEN (reverted to iter-021 monolith, byte-identical to `.presplit-backup`).

## FBC ‚Äî the abstract-cocycle fold route REFUTED in-file (decisive)
The prover authored a fully carrier-free skeleton `ring_square_cocycle_probe` (abstract `{ùíµ}[Category ùíµ]`,
six `Iso`s, conclusion `g ‚â™‚â´ pœÅ = qincl ‚â™‚â´ dœÅB ‚â™‚â´ sr ‚â™‚â´ dincl'.symm`, `sorry` body) and folded the glue
with `exact ring_square_cocycle_probe (chartBaseChangeGeometricComparison ‚Ä¶) ‚Ä¶`, binding the heavy carriers
(`tilde`, `pullback (Spec -)`, `extendScalars`) to the abstract metavars.

- **Result: whnf timeout @L2235 (200k hb) ‚Üí cold build RED.** The session ended waiting on the build (Monitor),
  so the prover never saw this result and never reverted; no task_result was written.
- **Finding (refutes iter-025/026 blueprint escape `lem:ring_square_cocycle`):** the "the `exact` binds carriers
  to metavars, never reduces them, timeout avoided entirely" premise is **FALSE**. Unification of the abstract
  conclusion against the concrete goal still forces whnf of the goal side (the concrete RHS last factor is not
  syntactically `_.symm`, so the kernel must reduce to test the shape). **The bomb is at the FOLD, not in the
  cocycle proof.** A carrier-free cocycle does not help if instantiating it re-summons the carriers via unification.
- The earlier (iter-024) carrier-BEARING functor-level route was already STUCK (over-budget at statement + fold).
  Both the carrier-bearing and the carrier-free-cocycle routes are now refuted. The functor/iso-level `‚â™‚â´`-glue is
  comprehensively blocked.
- The scratch REPL telescoping primitive the prover tried (`conjugateIsoEquiv` composite split, attempt at 02:13:42)
  failed at `rw [conjugateEquiv_comp]` (pattern not found ‚Äî the goal had already been `conjugateIsoEquiv_apply_hom`-
  rewritten to a single `conjugateEquiv adj‚ÇÅ adj‚ÇÉ` application, no composite to split). Minor; the cocycle proof was
  never the blocker ‚Äî the fold is.

## SNAP ‚Äî reverted to green monolith (iter-025 breakage healed)
iter-025's broken partial Option-A re-base was reverted to the iter-021 green MONOLITH. `SectionGradedRing.lean` is
now byte-identical to `.presplit-backup` (216852 B, 6 sorries); root imports it; `SectionGradedRingLocalized.lean`
is unimported (still on disk, sorry-free). Build verified green firsthand. Associator wall
`tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_native` @L2314 UNTOUCHED. The file split is undone.

## Subagent findings (reports in `.archon/logs/iter-026/`)
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker fbc026** (must-fix √ó2): blueprint `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` proof of
  `lem:pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_mate_glue` (tex L2851‚Äì2874) still claims the cocycle fold "avoids the
  timeout entirely" ‚Äî REFUTED this iter. `\lean{AlgebraicGeometry.ring_square_cocycle}` (tex L2754) is dangling
  (no such decl; only the temporary `sorry` probe). FBC chapter `\leanok` correctly all-stripped by sync (RED build).
  The genuinely-closed neighbor lemmas (`ring_square_glue_geom/alg_leg_nat`, `conjugateIsoEquiv_comp/_symm_comp`,
  `pullbackSpecTildeNatIso(+_app)`) are faithful. ‚Üí addressed via `% NOTE:` markers (below).
- **lean-auditor iter026** (critical 2 / major 3 / minor 2): critical = the RED build + must-revert probe
  (independently found). Major = (1)(2) ineffective `set_option maxHeartbeats` stacks @FBC L2353, L2388‚Äì2391
  applied to `/-! ‚Ä¶ -/` section-doc commands, NOT to `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose` @L2411 (dead apparatus,
  unguarded once filled); (3) SNAP associator wall (tracked). Confirmed all other decls axiom-clean/sorry-free.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`, `lem:ring_square_cocycle`: added `% NOTE:` after `\lean{}` ‚Äî target does not
  exist; iter-026 probe refuted the "kernel-light fold" premise (whnf timeout @L2235, build RED).
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`, `lem:pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_mate_glue` proof: added `% NOTE:` after
  the "avoided entirely" claim ‚Äî REFUTED in-file; the `exact` still forces goal-side whnf; the fold (not the cocycle
  proof) is the bomb; viable route must make the glue conclusion syntactically a cocycle instance or abandon the
  iso-level glue.
- No `\leanok` overrides: sync correctly stripped all FBC-chapter `\leanok` (RED build); correct verdict.

## Coverage debt
85 unmatched `lean_aux` (was 82; +3 incl. the temporary `ring_square_cocycle_probe` ‚Äî slated for deletion, do NOT
blueprint). Remainder pre-existing (~67 SNAP `Modules.*`, ~15 FBC helpers). Listed for planner in recommendations.

## Notes
- blueprint-doctor: 0 structural findings. sync_leanok iter-26 sha b065ada (+43/‚àí79; the ‚àí79 reflects the RED FBC
  build + SNAP revert ‚Äî deterministically correct).
- Process: the prover left the build RED because it backgrounded the gating build and the session ended on the
  Monitor wait before the result returned ‚Äî a probe that breaks the build must be reverted or guarded before lane end.
